sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97902" key="sugkrhtismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκρητ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n97902.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">union, federation of Cretan communities</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.490b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
